name: token-warden
description: Makes Claude Code subagents measurably cheaper over time: records token cost per session, distills candidate efficiency rules from expensive runs, benchmarks them on a frozen golden suite, and keeps only rules that save at least 2x their context rent. Also: per-tool/skill/MCP cost attribution, per-rule verdict receipts, model and prompt A/B benchmarking, cost-anomaly alerts, and team-shareable rule ledgers. 90% test coverage, CI-gated.
